subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: No, it is not the Spirit of God, but it is the Bounty of God. It is not a part of God, for it is His creation. To illustrate: Take a lamp
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @soul; spirit after death, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @The Holy Spirit
